snippet: Skylake is an Overnight California Summer Camp where campers experience traditional summer camp life without cell phones, video games or the internet. Skylake is located in the Sierra National Forest on Bass Lake, just 15 miles from Yosemite National Park. Most campers come from the Los Angeles and San Francisco area.
